column4: Description
Displays UniMove branding while the app checks session state and routes the user to onboarding login or home.
Introduces UniMove services and guides first-time users through key platform capabilities before sign-in.
Allows customers to sign in with email and password or Google OAuth.
Allows new customers to create an account with email password full name and phone number.
Lets users request a password reset link or OTP sent to their registered email.
Lets users enter OTP and set a new password after a forgot-password request.
Main bottom-navigation container with tabs for Home Payments Activity and Messages.
Shows quick actions banners featured providers recent orders and entry points for booking combo labor and Pass đồ.
Lists payment history wallet balance and shortcuts to payment settings and saved methods.
Shows active and recent orders with status badges and navigation to tracking or order detail.
Lists order and marketplace conversations with unread indicators.
Displays customer account summary avatar contact info and links to edit profile change password and order history.
Lets customers update personal details student ID university phone and avatar.
Lets authenticated customers change password by entering current and new password.
Lists past and current transport orders with filters and links to tracking or review.
Lets customers enter or select pickup and delivery addresses on the map with recent-place suggestions.
Collects move context such as dorm details item list floors and elevator availability.
Lets customers select pickup date and time for the transport booking.
Displays combo packages (Economy Standard Premium) with bundled transport and labor pricing.
Lists verified transport providers with filters for price rating and distance for standard bookings.
Shows reference pricing guide to help customers understand expected move costs before booking.
Lets customers choose cargo insurance plan before checkout.
Shows order summary price breakdown promotion code entry and PayOS deposit payment.
Tracks quotation-based booking status from submission through provider responses.
Displays a single provider quote with price breakdown and accept or reject actions.
Lets customers set pickup schedule after a provider quote is accepted.
Entry screen to book standalone loading/unloading labor service.
Lets customers select an existing move order to attach labor service to.
Configures labor details such as number of helpers hours and floor access.
Lists labor providers available for the configured labor request.
Shows live order status timeline map with provider location and ETA during active transport.
Lets customers rate the provider and submit a written review after order completion.
Central payment settings screen with links to payment methods and transaction preferences.
Lists saved payment methods such as card Momo and PayOS-linked options.
Lets customers choose a payment method type to add to their account.
Lets customers enter card details to save a payment method.
Guides customers through linking an external wallet or PayOS payment method.
Shows detail of a single payment transaction including amount status and PayOS reference.
Displays full content of a system or order notification and marks it as read.
Student marketplace with Explore Favorites and My Listings tabs for browsing and managing Pass đồ items.
Lets sellers post a used-item listing with photos category condition pickup area and price.
Handles PayOS payment when a listing fee is required before the post goes public.
Shows item photos description price deal status and buyer/seller action buttons.
Supports negotiation chat between buyer and seller including price proposals and deal confirmation.
Displays seller reputation stats ratings and active listings on the marketplace.
Lets buyer choose delivery address and transport type (combo or standard) after deal confirmation.
Displays branding while checking provider session and routing to login or home.
Introduces provider app features and verification requirements for new transport partners.
Allows providers to sign in with email password or Google OAuth.
Allows transport businesses to register a new provider account with business details.
Main bottom-navigation container with Dashboard Orders Earnings Messages and Profile tabs.
Shows today's orders earnings summary pending tasks and quick operational shortcuts.
Lists incoming and active orders with accept decline and detail actions.
Summarizes revenue completed orders and links to earnings history and payout settings.
Lists conversations with customers on active orders.
Shows provider account business info verification status and profile management links.
Displays full order information customer contact addresses pricing and status action buttons.
Provider-side map screen for updating location and monitoring route during active transport.
Upload and manage verification documents such as ID license vehicle registration and insurance.
View and update provider availability schedule for accepting new orders.
Lists historical earnings transactions and completed order payouts.
Configure bank account details for receiving earned revenue withdrawals.
Displays customer ratings and reviews received with option to respond.
Read-only public provider profile viewable by customers.
Lists system and order notifications with unread count.
Shows full notification content and related order context.
Administrator authentication screen for the Next.js admin web dashboard.
Displays KPI cards revenue charts order status distribution and latest orders table.
Lists and manages customer and provider accounts with search suspend and activate actions.
Review queue for pending provider documents with approve and reject actions.
Lists all platform orders with status filters search and navigation to order detail.
Shows full order information admin actions including force cancel and refund context.
Manages customer disputes and refund requests with evidence review and resolution actions.
Moderates customer and marketplace reviews with hide unhide and flag actions.
Displays revenue GMV order statistics provider performance and commission charts.
Create and publish system announcements and broadcast notifications.
Audit trail of admin actions order status changes verifications and refund history.
Configure platform parameters theme preferences and admin account settings.
Administrator profile view and avatar management.
Public marketing page introducing UniMove services pricing and call-to-action for booking.
Public web authentication entry that redirects users into the customer app registration flow.
Information pages for frequently asked questions and customer support contact form.
